brief: Tensions escalate in the Middle East with US strikes and Iranian missile attacks on tankers, while domestic news features ICE shootings and the death of cartoonist Pat Oliphant. In research, papers examine AI's role in creative writing and data communication.
news_summary: The US launches new strikes on Iran as the UAE condemns Iranian missiles hitting tankers; a Colombian man is fatally shot by ICE; tributes pour in for Sam Neill and Pat Oliphant.
papers_summary: Papers explore AI-assisted creative writing through collaborative gameplay, TikTok users' climate change expressions, and a taxonomy of data narrative failures.

en.brief: Tensions escalate in the Middle East with US strikes and Iranian missile attacks on tankers, while domestic news features ICE shootings and the death of cartoonist Pat Oliphant. In research, papers examine AI's role in creative writing and data communication.
en.news_summary: The US launches new strikes on Iran as the UAE condemns Iranian missiles hitting tankers; a Colombian man is fatally shot by ICE; tributes pour in for Sam Neill and Pat Oliphant.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore AI-assisted creative writing through collaborative gameplay, TikTok users' climate change expressions, and a taxonomy of data narrative failures.

zh.brief: 今日重點：直布羅陀邊境開放、霸王龍化石高價拍賣、曼谷酒吧大火、美國參議員葛蘭姆去世、颱風巴威侵襲華北。
zh.news_summary: 英西118年邊防撤關，直布羅陀迎來自由流動；6700萬年霸王龍化石將在紐約拍賣，估值創紀錄；曼谷酒吧大火致27死；美國參議員葛蘭姆逝世，影響共和黨議程；颱風巴威北上，河北大水困千人。
zh.papers_summary: 研究探討LLM在專業郵件中的語氣影響，以及數據敘事失敗的分類學。

todays_image.caption: Like the Tyrannosaurus rex's unchecked dominance led to its extinction, AI companies' refusal to self-regulate risks a catastrophic loss of trust.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
